name: radiogroup
description: A set of mutually exclusive options where only one can be checked at a time. The group, not each button, is what a label and a single tab stop attach to.

requires.roles.label: the radiogroup element has aria-labelledby or aria-label
requires.focus.roving: one tab stop for the whole group; on entry, focus lands on the checked button, or the first button if none is checked
requires.keyboard.ArrowKeys: Right/Down or Left/Up moves focus to the next/previous button, unchecking the previously focused one and checking the newly focused one, wrapping at the ends
requires.keyboard.Space: checks the focused radio button if it is not already checked
requires.states.checked: aria-checked set to true on the checked button, false on the rest
